ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock exchange was founded */,
  "mic_code" TEXT /* Market identifier code (MIC) for the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "money" REAL /* Total money traded of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_close" REAL /* Predicted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Model used for the prediction (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_data" (
  "exchange_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock exchange on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock exchange on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock exchange on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock exchange on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock exchange on the given date */,
  "money" REAL /* Total money traded of the stock exchange on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange the prediction belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_close" REAL /* Predicted closing price of the stock exchange on the given date */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Model used for the prediction (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_predictions_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the data source */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials for the data source (e.g., username, password) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "import_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "export_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported data in bytes */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preference it is */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
